creator: anders@jensenwaud.com
text:
Created attachment 156642
Patch

Hi,

As part of our effort to port CoreCLR and the Roslyn compiler collection to FreeBSD, it has been necessary for us to have a working version of Mono v4.0.1 on FreeBSD.

The version in Ports is on version 3.x, which is getting quite old. So I updated the port Makefile to 4.0.1.28, the most recent available version from the Mono team.

The patch is available from here:

https://github.com/ajensenwaud/mono4-freebsd-ports/tree/master/mono

The patch is attachd to this PR.
